department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
eligibility_criteria: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land; excludes institutional landholders and farmers who pay income tax
land_holding_limit: No upper limit but small/marginal farmers prioritized
required_documents: Aadhaar card, land ownership records (khatauni/khasra), bank account passbook, mobile number linked to Aadhaar
benefit_description: Rs 6000 per year in three equal installments of Rs 2000 directly to bank account via DBT
application_process: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) with land documents and Aadhaar
hindi_keywords: kisan paisa nahi aaya, bank account, samman nidhi, pradhan mantri kisan

department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
eligibility_criteria: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
required_documents: Land records or tenancy agreement, Aadhaar card, bank account details, sowing certificate
benefit_description: Insurance cover against crop loss due to natural calamities; premium as low as 2% for kharif and 1.5% for rabi crops
application_process: Apply through bank, CSC, or insurance company before the cutoff date for the cropping season; loanee farmers auto-enrolled
hindi_keywords: fasal kharab, baadh, sukha, crop insurance, fasal bima, natural calamity, faslon ka nuksan

eligibility_criteria: Farmers including tenant farmers oral lessees and sharecroppers; self-help group members
land_holding_limit: Based on cropping pattern and land holding
required_documents: Aadhaar card, land documents, passport size photo, identity proof
benefit_description: Short-term credit up to Rs 3 lakh at subsidized interest rate of 4 percent with timely repayment; covers crop production and allied activities
application_process: Apply at any nationalized bank, regional rural bank, or cooperative bank branch with land and identity documents
hindi_keywords: loan chahiye, karz, credit card kisan, paisa udhar, kisan credit

department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
eligibility_criteria: Individual farmers Farmer Producer Organizations and Self Help Groups
income_limit: No income limit specified but priority to small and marginal farmers
required_documents: Aadhaar card, land record, bank passbook, caste certificate if applicable for higher subsidy
benefit_description: Subsidy of 40 to 50 percent on purchase of farm machinery like tractors power tillers and harvesters
application_process: Apply through state agriculture department portal or DBT Agriculture Mechanization portal
hindi_keywords: tractor chahiye, mशीन, machinery, krishi yantra, kheti ka samaan

department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
eligibility_criteria: All farmers across India regardless of land size
required_documents: Land record or self declaration, Aadhaar card for registration
benefit_description: Free soil testing every 2 years with crop-wise nutrient and fertilizer recommendations to improve yield
application_process: Soil sample collected by local agriculture department; card issued free of cost through village level worker
hindi_keywords: mitti jaanch, soil testing, khad, fertilizer salah

department: Ministry of Agriculture and Jal Shakti
eligibility_criteria: Farmers needing irrigation infrastructure including small and marginal farmers
land_holding_limit: No upper limit but small farmers prioritized for higher subsidy
required_documents: Land ownership document, Aadhaar card, bank account, water source proof
benefit_description: Subsidy up to 55 percent for small farmers and 45 percent for other farmers on drip and sprinkler irrigation systems
application_process: Apply through state horticulture or agriculture department office or online state portal
hindi_keywords: paani ki samasya, sinchai, irrigation, khet mein paani, drip sprinkler, paani ki kami

department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
eligibility_criteria: Farmers growing rice wheat pulses coarse cereals or nutri-cereals in identified districts
required_documents: Land record, Aadhaar card, bank account passbook
benefit_description: Subsidized seeds farm implements and training to increase production of food grains
application_process: Apply through Krishi Vigyan Kendra or block agriculture office
hindi_keywords: anaaj, beej, seeds chahiye, food grain, krishi vigyan kendra

department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
eligibility_criteria: Women from BPL households without an existing LPG connection
income_limit: Household must be BPL or covered under SECC list
required_documents: Aadhaar card, BPL ration card or SECC verification, bank account passbook, passport size photo
benefit_description: Free LPG gas connection with first refill and stove provided; deposit-free connection
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor with required documents or apply online at pmuy.gov.in
hindi_keywords: gas connection, LPG, chulha, cooking gas, patni ke liye gas

eligibility_criteria: Any adult member of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work
required_documents: Aadhaar card, job card application form, bank or post office account
benefit_description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per household per year in rural areas at notified wage rate
application_process: Apply for job card at Gram Panchayat office; work demanded in writing and must be provided within 15 days
hindi_keywords: kaam nahi hai, gaon mein rozgar, mazdoori, employment guarantee, kaam chahiye, naukri gaon mein

eligibility_criteria: Houseless families and households living in kutcha or dilapidated houses as per SECC data
income_limit: Must be in SECC 2011 deprivation list or Awaas+ survey
required_documents: Aadhaar card, SECC verification, bank account, MGNREGA job card if available
benefit_description: Financial assistance of Rs 1.2 lakh in plain areas and Rs 1.3 lakh in hilly areas for house construction
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or check eligibility on PMAYG portal using Awaas+ app
hindi_keywords: kaccha ghar, pakka ghar banana, ghar ke liye paisa, awas yojana, makaan
